svg.text: Steve Griffing, PE(CSE), CISSP-ISSEP, CPP · CC BY 4.0 · 2026
Apply decals · FAA registration · show markings
Print decal sheet on waterslide paper
Seal with 2 coats clear lacquer — dry 30min
Cut each decal along pink dashed lines
Soak in warm water until decal slides (30s)
Slide decal off backing onto wet surface
Let dry 24h · seal all decals with clear coat
B1 reg block: MUST be on exterior, visible
B4 reg block: place inside cockpit bay
displayed on the EXTERIOR of the aircraft.
REPLACE N00000 with your FAA number!
Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 · Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 · Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal — Fan engineering work
